---
title: "chi-squared metaboliser"
format: html
---

```{r}
#Per-phenotype vs UK/France 
#Load relevant libraries
library(dplyr)
library(gt)

# ── 1. Load Turkey data ──────────────────────────────────────
df_risk <- read.csv("PMDF3_risk_cleaned.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

get_turkey_counts <- function(group) {
  df_risk %>%
    filter(phenotype == group,
           Cyrius_phenotype %in% c("PM", "IM", "NM", "UM")) %>%
    { list(
        counts = table(.$Cyrius_phenotype),
        n      = nrow(.)
      )}
}
 
turkey_als  <- get_turkey_counts("ALS")
turkey_ctrl <- get_turkey_counts("Control")

cat("Turkey ALS counts:\n");     print(turkey_als$counts);  cat("n =", turkey_als$n,  "\n\n")
cat("Turkey Control counts:\n"); print(turkey_ctrl$counts); cat("n =", turkey_ctrl$n, "\n\n")
 
```


```{r}
# ── 2. Published percentages from Vallikivi et al. Table 1 ───
# UK:     ALS n=1219  %PM=7.1,  %IM=40.9, %NM=50.5, %UM=1.6
#         Ctrl n=380  %PM=6.6,  %IM=37.9, %NM=53.4, %UM=2.1
# France: ALS n=243   %PM=6.2,  %IM=35,   %NM=55.1, %UM=3.7
#         Ctrl n=38   %PM=5.3,  %IM=23.7, %NM=68.4, %UM=2.6
 
cohort_data <- list(
  UK = list(
    ALS     = list(n=1219, pct=c(PM=7.1,  IM=40.9, NM=50.5, UM=1.6)),
    Control = list(n=380,  pct=c(PM=6.6,  IM=37.9, NM=53.4, UM=2.1))
  ),
  France = list(
    ALS     = list(n=243,  pct=c(PM=6.2,  IM=35.0, NM=55.1, UM=3.7)),
    Control = list(n=38,   pct=c(PM=5.3,  IM=23.7, NM=68.4, UM=2.6))
  )
)
 
# Reconstruct counts from percentages
for (cohort in names(cohort_data)) {
  for (group in c("ALS", "Control")) {
    d <- cohort_data[[cohort]][[group]]
    counts <- round(d$n * d$pct / 100)
    cohort_data[[cohort]][[group]]$counts <- counts
    cat(sprintf("%s %s counts (reconstructed): ", cohort, group))
    print(counts)
    cat(sprintf("  Total: %d (published n=%d)\n\n", sum(counts), d$n))
  }
}
```
```{r}
# ── 3. 2x2 chi-squared / Fisher function ─────────────────────
run_2x2 <- function(pheno, t_counts, t_n, c_counts, c_n, comp_label, group_label) {
  t_yes <- as.integer(t_counts[pheno])
  t_no  <- t_n - t_yes
  c_yes <- as.integer(c_counts[pheno])
  c_no  <- c_n - c_yes
 
  mat <- matrix(c(t_yes, t_no, c_yes, c_no),
                nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE,
                dimnames = list(
                  c("Turkey", comp_label),
                  c(pheno, paste0("non-", pheno))
                ))
 
  result  <- chisq.test(mat, correct = FALSE)
  exp_min <- min(result$expected)
 
  if (exp_min < 5) {
    fisher <- fisher.test(mat)
    p_val  <- fisher$p.value
    test   <- "Fisher"
    x2     <- NA
  } else {
    p_val  <- result$p.value
    test   <- "Chi-sq"
    x2     <- round(result$statistic, 3)
  }
 
  data.frame(
    Group          = group_label,
    Comparison     = paste("Turkey vs", comp_label),
    Phenotype      = pheno,
    Turkey_n       = t_yes,
    Turkey_pct     = round(100 * t_yes / t_n, 1),
    Comparison_n   = c_yes,
    Comparison_pct = round(100 * c_yes / c_n, 1),
    Test           = test,
    X_squared      = x2,
    p_value        = round(p_val, 4),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}
```

```{r}
# ── 4. Run all 32 tests ──────────────────────────────────────
phenotypes   <- c("PM", "IM", "NM", "UM")
groups       <- c("ALS", "Control")
comparisons  <- c("UK", "France")
turkey_data  <- list(ALS = turkey_als, Control = turkey_ctrl)
 
results_list <- list()
 
for (grp in groups) {
  for (comp in comparisons) {
    for (p in phenotypes) {
      key <- paste(grp, comp, p, sep="_")
      results_list[[key]] <- run_2x2(
        pheno      = p,
        t_counts   = turkey_data[[grp]]$counts,
        t_n        = turkey_data[[grp]]$n,
        c_counts   = cohort_data[[comp]][[grp]]$counts,
        c_n        = cohort_data[[comp]][[grp]]$n,
        comp_label = comp,
        group_label = grp
      )
    }
  }
}
 
results <- do.call(rbind, results_list)
rownames(results) <- NULL
```

```{r}
# ── 5. BH FDR correction across all 32 tests ─────────────────
results$FDR_q <- round(p.adjust(results$p_value, method = "BH"), 4)
 
# ── 6. Print results ─────────────────────────────────────────
cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("PER-PHENOTYPE 2x2 RESULTS — ALS\n")
cat("========================================\n\n")
print(results[results$Group == "ALS", ], row.names = FALSE)
 
cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("PER-PHENOTYPE 2x2 RESULTS — CONTROLS\n")
cat("========================================\n\n")
print(results[results$Group == "Control", ], row.names = FALSE)
 
cat("\nSignificant results (FDR q < 0.05):\n")
sig <- results[results$FDR_q < 0.05, ]
if (nrow(sig) == 0) cat("  None\n") else print(sig, row.names = FALSE)

```
```{r}
write.csv(results, "chisq_perphenotype_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
cat("\nResults saved to chisq_perphenotype_results.csv\n")
```


```{r}
#Omnibus vs pooled European
# Check counts in risk dataset
cat("Turkey RISK dataset counts:\n")
cat("ALS cases:\n")
df_risk %>%
  filter(phenotype == "ALS") %>%
  count(Cyrius_phenotype)

cat("\nControls:\n")
df_risk %>%
  filter(phenotype == "Control") %>%
  count(Cyrius_phenotype)

cat("Turkey ALS cases:\n")
df_risk %>%
  filter(phenotype == "ALS") %>%
  count(Cyrius_phenotype)

cat("\nTurkey controls:\n")
df_risk %>%
  filter(phenotype == "Control") %>%
  count(Cyrius_phenotype)
```

```{r}
# =============================================================
# Chi-squared goodness of fit test
# Turkey ALS cases and controls vs published European frequencies
# Source: Vallikivi et al. Table 1 (across cohorts)
# ALS:      PM=6.9%,  IM=41.5%, NM=49.4%, UM=2.2%
# Controls: PM=6.2%,  IM=39.6%, NM=52.5%, UM=1.7%
# =============================================================

# ── ALS cases ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
observed_als <- c(IM = 187, NM = 368, PM = 20, UM = 26)
expected_als <- c(IM = 0.415, NM = 0.494, PM = 0.069, UM = 0.022)

cat("=== ALS CASES ===\n")
cat("Turkey observed vs European expected:\n")
data.frame(
  Phenotype    = names(observed_als),
  Observed_n   = observed_als,
  Observed_pct = round(observed_als / sum(observed_als) * 100, 1),
  Expected_pct = expected_als * 100
) %>% print()

chi_als <- chisq.test(observed_als, p = expected_als)
cat("\nChi-squared goodness of fit:\n")
print(chi_als)

# ── Controls ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
observed_ctrl <- c(IM = 47, NM = 89, PM = 4, UM = 4)
expected_ctrl <- c(IM = 0.396, NM = 0.525, PM = 0.062, UM = 0.017)

cat("\n=== CONTROLS ===\n")
cat("Turkey observed vs European expected:\n")
data.frame(
  Phenotype    = names(observed_ctrl),
  Observed_n   = observed_ctrl,
  Observed_pct = round(observed_ctrl / sum(observed_ctrl) * 100, 1),
  Expected_pct = expected_ctrl * 100
) %>% print()

chi_ctrl <- chisq.test(observed_ctrl, p = expected_ctrl)
cat("\nChi-squared goodness of fit:\n")
print(chi_ctrl)
```

```{r}
cat("ALS chi-squared:\n")
print(chi_als)

cat("\nControls chi-squared:\n")
print(chi_ctrl)
```

```{r}
results_gt <- data.frame(
  Group      = c("ALS cases", "Controls"),
  Turkey_NM  = c("61.2%", "61.8%"),
  Europe_NM  = c("49.4%", "52.5%"),
  Turkey_IM  = c("31.1%", "32.6%"),
  Europe_IM  = c("41.5%", "39.6%"),
  Turkey_PM  = c("3.3%", "2.8%"),
  Europe_PM  = c("6.9%", "6.2%"),
  Turkey_UM  = c("4.3%", "2.8%"),
  Europe_UM  = c("2.2%", "1.7%"),
  X2         = c("56.11", "7.84"),
  p_value    = c("< 0.001***", "0.049*")
) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title    = "CYP2D6 metaboliser phenotype distribution",
    subtitle = "Turkey cohort vs published European frequencies — chi-squared goodness of fit"
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "NM", columns = c(Turkey_NM, Europe_NM)) %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "IM", columns = c(Turkey_IM, Europe_IM)) %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "PM", columns = c(Turkey_PM, Europe_PM)) %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "UM", columns = c(Turkey_UM, Europe_UM)) %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "Chi-squared test", columns = c(X2, p_value)) %>%
  cols_label(
    Group     = "Group",
    Turkey_NM = "Turkey", Europe_NM = "Europe",
    Turkey_IM = "Turkey", Europe_IM = "Europe",
    Turkey_PM = "Turkey", Europe_PM = "Europe",
    Turkey_UM = "Turkey", Europe_UM = "Europe",
    X2        = "X² (df=3)",
    p_value   = "p-value"
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_body(columns = p_value)
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_fill(color = "#f0f7ff"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = 1)
  ) %>%
  tab_footnote("NM – normal metaboliser, IM – intermediate metaboliser, PM – poor metaboliser, UM – ultrarapid metaboliser.") %>%
  tab_footnote("European frequencies sourced from Vallikivi et al. Table 1 (across cohorts): ALS PM=6.9%, IM=41.5%, NM=49.4%, UM=2.2%; Controls PM=6.2%, IM=39.6%, NM=52.5%, UM=1.7%.") %>%
  tab_footnote("Turkey ALS cases n=601; Turkey controls n=144. *** p<0.001, * p<0.05.") %>%
  tab_options(
    table.font.names          = "Cambria",
    heading.align             = "left",
    column_labels.font.weight = "bold",
    table.border.top.style    = "solid",
    table.border.bottom.style = "solid",
    table.font.size           = 12
  )

gtsave(results_gt, "turkey_vs_europe_chisq_table.png", zoom = 2)
cat("Saved: turkey_vs_europe_chisq_table.png\n")
```
